payload.label: towel
payload.long_description: Off-white/cream rectangular hanging towel with a central symmetrical brown/gray embroidered motif, small sewn label near the bottom, light wrinkles and a short bottom fringe; fabric appears woven/terry and the left/right edges are slightly cropped in the image (approx. 1.0 m from camera).
